_meta.intent: TARGET-STATE config spine. Slow-changing org reference data only. Operational entities (PRODUCTIONS) AND assignment/position data (Staff Positions) are owned by their spoke, not here (DG-001, DG-005, greenfield discipline).
_meta.status: target-state draft, unverified against live file

conventions.keys: bare PrimaryKey + fk<Parent> style (matches uritp-people + HML house style)
excluded: PRODUCTIONS → owned by the Productions/Company builder; GS keeps only selector table-occurrences (match-key context), not the table

Staff Positions / position assignments → owned by LABOUR (DG-005). Positions are so intertwined with employment + student-worker assignment that they are operational, not config. GS carries nothing; contact sheets get a title by joining THROUGH Labour at report time.

tables.name: GLOBAL_USAGE_VARIABLES
tables.description: Single-row org config. Branding + the three fiscal-year pointers every app reads. Never hardcode these locally.

fields.name: Header_Logo
fields.notes: URITP logo used across all files

fields.name: FULL_COMPANY_NAME
fields.notes: University of Rochester International Theatre Program

fields.name: fkCURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR
fields.notes: → Fiscal_Years; set by the rollover step-scripts

tables.name: Fiscal_Years
tables.description: Fiscal-year definitions. Referenced by GLOBAL_USAGE_VARIABLES pointers, Academic_Periods, and the builder-owned PRODUCTIONS.

tables.name: Academic_Periods
tables.description: Semester/term definitions, each tied to a fiscal year. Consumed by semester-aware apps (Courses, Labour).

tables.name: Departments
tables.description: Shared department reference. Consumed by department-aware apps (Labour, Inventory, Safety, budget apps). NOTE: Labour's position/assignment tables reference THIS for department, keeping departments the shared spine while positions live in Labour.
